Game: Virtua Tennis 2000-07-12T00:00:00-07:00 Directly translated from the popular arcade stand-up, Virtua Tennis offers a light-year jump from the Pong-style tennis of yesteryear. Sporting rich 3-D graphics, crisp animation, and realistic sound effects, you'll swear you're courtside at a grand slam. But, thanks to the game's simple controls, you won't have to spend years at a tennis camp just learning a backhand. The game features hard-top, grass, and clay surfaces, all with distinct ball-bounce and sound responses. Choose one of eight internationally ranked tennis pros and play against advanced computer opponents, or plug an extra controller in and play a friend head to head. Just as in real championships, ball boys, chair umps, and even spectators react to your game. 4 http://images.launchbox-app.com/50e5e8fe-4a4c-47f3-876e-1f4ce1738bb2.jpg <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/de15dbc4-8766-44b7-82b4-17b4ed675935.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/9b0edd52-3728-48a6-8186-076a648f40b4.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/b47e7dd4-dc45-4e7d-a050-90f7814f9dc3.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/e7368455-1fde-4433-809c-7791150a006b.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/780d5e4a-cf2b-416a-8f24-1d4c0e1cc385.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/5cce58c9-779b-4d40-8576-d53eadffb8f6.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/abd18f66-d2ed-4039-9828-b714e9bed897.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/d9a8aec1-7f86-442d-9ccf-9bf0acae4812.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/03029916-436b-4209-b88a-9bad73c93a8e.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/2de18fdf-b97b-4c1e-bfc1-9e86cc443c2f.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/00e22927-cd47-4000-bc17-1978bdce675e.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/236e1207-873f-49cb-886c-7fcaab4320a5.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/18763110-21eb-4eb9-a429-8118c7d59833.png 4.4 E - Everyone Sports Hitmaker Sega
